hero.subtitle: Discover unique destinations, live shared experiences and create memories that last forever. Tourism, culture and human connection in one place.

destinations.title: Destinations that inspire
destinations.subtitle: From the Andean peaks to the Amazon depths, every destination is a story waiting to be lived.

tours.title: Experiences designed for you
tours.subtitle: Tours that combine adventure, culture and the opportunity to meet extraordinary people.

connection.subtitle: More than a tour, it's an opportunity to meet incredible people in unique natural settings. Elegant, authentic, memorable.
connection.feature_1_desc: Tours designed so that togetherness is part of the journey. Selected groups to ensure compatibility.
connection.feature_2_desc: Natural environments that foster genuine encounters. No forcing, no artificiality. Just people and experiences.
connection.feature_3_desc: The best memories are created in company. Each tour is a story you'll keep telling years later.
connection.quote: "I came to see Machu Picchu. I left with friendships for life."

gallery.title: Moments that inspire
gallery.subtitle: Real images from our travelers at the most impressive destinations in Peru.

shop.title: Flavors and art from Peru
shop.subtitle: Authentic products from the regions we visit. Take a piece of Peru wherever you go.

testimonials.title: What our travelers say
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of people have trusted Amor y Aventura for their most memorable experiences.

cta.subtitle: Book a tour, buy regional products or just write to us. We're here to help you live the Peru you always dreamed of.

footer.tagline: Authentic tourism, real connections and regional products from Peru.

whatsapp.message: Hello, I'm interested in learning more about your tours and experiences at Amor y Aventura
